terms.definition: ML using multi-layer neural networks to learn hierarchical representations from data end-to-end. Canonical definition in this topic.
Learning useful internal features or embeddings automatically during training instead of supplying hand-crafted features.
A neural network with multiple stacked hidden layers that transform inputs through successive learned representations.
Representations where early layers capture simple patterns and deeper layers compose them into complex concepts.
Training all parts of a pipeline jointly from raw or near-raw inputs to final outputs with one differentiable objective.
Synonym for representation learning in neural networks — weights in hidden layers encode the discovered features.
